title: H_007 G-1 d=64 kill-only smoke = PROCEED-CANDIDATE (weak-positive) — 3/3 gates cleared train_g1_smoke.py trains a shared d=64 trunk with two byte-LM heads (head-A forward + head-G swap-target for A-tug / forward-dup for C-dup). NOT killed: (i) P-conflict role-specific, differential cos-grad vs C-dup +0.2716 (A-tug conflicted then resolves late; C-dup heads converge) — the absolute cos was confounded by the two separate readout heads (C-dup showed cos=A-tug at init), so the instrument was corrected to the differential vs C-dup; (ii) faithful f2 forced-choice d_acc A-tug 0.5677 > C-dup 0.4948, sep +0.0729. The subject-class probe (0.9655 both arms) is a free-ingredient diagnostic that falsely read KILL until repointed at the composition (H_005 phi-hon ceiling trap). HONEST CAVEAT: sep +0.073 is below the F1 bar 0.15 and single-seed at undertrained d=64 — direction right, gate cleared, promises nothing. All 3 freeze-blocking $0 gates now cleared (lit-verify + G-0 + G-1); next = pre_register_frozen then ~7h d=384x2seedx5arm G-2.

H_007 G-0 SWAP-XOR panel gate CLEARED (2/3 $0 gates) build_swap_xor.py builds the SWAP-XOR verdict panel (f2 n=192 OOD, f1 n=64 liveness) where gold=class(subject)⊕form(object-marker) with role read from a case marker under SOV/OSV scrambling. ALL 10 closed-form audits PASS: free-slot=[0], GF(2) codebook rank=2 (gold in neither ingredient alone), every single-site heuristic EXACTLY 0.500, length-parity, byte-aligned swap(x) transpose, and a structural supervision-leak ban (answer forms absent from head-G target). First build FAILED the heuristic audit (worst-byte 0.677 = finite-sample overfit) + held-out overlap; root-caused to random sampling and fixed with a deterministic-balanced construction (each lexeme balanced across the marker bit = exact decorrelation, H_004's orthogonal-array discipline). Second of 3 freeze-blocking gates cleared; next = G-1 d=64 kill-only smoke (P-conflict cos-grad<0 measured + probe separation vs C-dup).

H_007 lit-verify /bin/zsh gate CLEARED — contrarian premise verified sidecar research confirmed the load-bearing citation: PCGrad (Yu 2020, arXiv 2001.06782), GradNorm (Chen, 1711.02257), and Recon (2302.11289) all treat gradient conflict (cos<0) as a pathology to REMOVE — so mech-5's bet (the conflict is the forge that builds a recombinable role-code) is genuinely contrarian to the gradient-surgery literature, making both a green and a red informative. Caruana 1997 / SCAN / ELECTRA are foundational supporting priors (non-critical). First of H_007's 3 freeze-blocking $0 gates cleared; next = G-0 SWAP-XOR panel build + codebook audit, then G-1 d=64 kill-only smoke.

H_005 G3-a verdict: WIRING FAILURE (precond) + K3 → consolidate at G-2 The learned-χ̂ run (free-slot d=384 ×2seed) returned WIRING FAILURE: A-χ̂ fit its own drill unstably (1.0/0.832, s1<0.95) — a training-stability limit of the tiny learned bilinear g (wiring clean; A-hand on the same rig fit 1.0/1.0). Substantive signal needs no unstable seed: F1a passes (Δ 0.298/0.191, F4/F5 clean) but F1a′ FAILS both incl the fit seed s0 (A-χ̂ 0.82/0.71 ≪ A-hand 1.0, margin −0.18/−0.29) = Fable's K3 — the learned χ̂ cannot reproduce the hand concord at this scale (honest-limit a, G3-0d probe=1.0). DECISION per K3 STOP: CONSOLIDATE AT G-2. H_004's FIELD-FORMAT claim (🟢 SUPPORTED) is the campaign's proven, defensible result; G3-a does not extend it; no re-run (fit-seed F1a′-fail excludes SUPPORTED). G3-b/H_006 (trained SUPPORT) remains the only untried lever but is strictly harder — needs a fresh research gate. Card+REGISTRY+SSOT updated.

H_005 G3-0d gate PASS (probe φ→hon=1.0) — buildable, honest-limit(a) scoped The G3-a admissibility gate ran on the real d=384 CPT trunk: logistic probe φ→hon held-out acc=1.0 (n=1200) ≥0.90 → PASS, χ̂=g(φ) can read concord, G3-a is buildable. But acc=1.0 hits honest-limit(a) at the ceiling: the templatic drill register lets the frozen trunk encode the hon bit near-verbatim, so g(φ) is ~one linear unmix from g(raw hon); the eventual F1a-green claim is SCOPED to 'concord recoverable from trunk representations on the drill register' — a modest, honestly-bounded result (F5 still guards vacuity). Recorded on the card + SSOT node ng.mech1.g3a-h005. Also fixed card F6 inconsistency (G3-a has no C-plc; C-χ̂plc IS the placebo). NEXT: F4/F5 for A-χ̂ + collect_verdict_g3a → H_005 freeze → ~4h run.

H_005 pre-register SEED — G3-a learned χ̂ (values half of the learned duel) After H_004 🟢 SUPPORTED + the G-3 research-gate, the next method-step (pre-register) is done: H_005 cards G3-a — can a LEARNED concord χ̂=g(φᵢ,φⱼ) on the FIXED proxy support reproduce the hand-computed field's causal power. Lever = χ policy (hand χ vs learned χ̂), support held fixed. Arms A-χ̂/A-hand/C-χ̂plc/C-scaf/C-perm; primary F1a d_acc(A-χ̂)−d_acc(C-χ̂plc)≥0.15 both (headroom 0.32, 2× the bar); F1a′ non-inferiority A-χ̂≥A-hand−0.05; F2-F6/harness carried from H_004 on free-slot d_acc. NOT frozen — $0 gate G3-0d (hon-bit trunk probe ≥0.9) + a d=64 smoke (device+injection+one-variable, per this session's 3-defect discipline) gate the freeze. Kill K2/K3 → consolidate at H_004's FORMAT claim. H_004 stays sealed.

H_004 mech-1 파서결투 → 🟢 SUPPORTED (first non-negative verdict) collect_verdict_h004.py on the free-slot d=384 ×2seed ×5arm run returns SUPPORTED: F1 Δ(A-duel−A-rank1)=0.3789/0.3802 ≥0.15 both seeds, and critically the two measurements that killed anima(v1) both PASS — F4 offtop 0.6467/0.6963 ≥0.20 (R reads a HIGH-rank field, not L1's rank-1 one-bit seam) and F5 d_dacc 0.5/0.5 ≥0.05 (strip the resolution → A-duel 1.0→0.5, so the decoder needs the resolved field, not L2's any-tensor capacity); F2/F3/F6/harness/precond all clean both seeds. The parse-tension FIELD FORMAT (edge-aligned, high-dimensional) causes held-out honorific binding beyond its rank-1 summary. SCOPE: χ is hand-computed, so this certifies the FIELD FORMAT as causal carrier but does NOT yet claim a trained parser pair produces it — SUPPORTED licenses building the learned-duel stage next. Reached after 3 root-caused defects (device-placement · CE-dilution · GF(2)-rank-4 parity metric-ceiling). Card+REGISTRY+SSOT updated.

H_004 free-slot fit-check GO → full run RE-LAUNCHED Free-slot fit-check PASSED all three bars: A-duel free drill 1.0/1.0 (bar1), ce_ans 0.0004 (bar2), C-perm free drill 0.4648∈[.40,.60] + held-out f2″ 0.4922∈[.45,.55] + parity slots 1.0/1.0 (bar3) → GO. Per-slot [0.25,0.47,0.61,1.0,0.53,1.0] confirms Fable's parity diagnosis exactly (free slots chance, parity slots 1.0) and the leak is gone under free-slot scoring. Card RE-FROZEN with 2 documented quarantine amendments (A1 objective dilution, A2 free-slot metric; arms/panels/T/thresholds unchanged). Full run re-launched: d=384 ×2seed ×5arm, drill 4000, free-slot metric (~4h).

H_004 bar3 adjudicated: metric parity-ceiling defect → free-slot re-registration Fable (btgczi488) + $0 reference-match on the codebook found the bar3 fail is NOT a surface leak but a metric-ceiling defect: the K=6 gold codebook is GF(2) rank-4 (slot3=s0⊕s1⊕s2, slot5=s1⊕s2⊕s4 on all codewords, drill+f2″); teacher-forced scoring lets any answer-LM (incl. shuffled-gold C-perm) complete the 2 parity slots → field-blind d_acc ceiling 0.667 reaching held-out. Per-slot log confirms C-perm=[0.25,0.5,0.59,1.0,0.5,1.0] (parity slots 1.0, free slots chance). A-duel F1 equally inflated → mech-1 uninterpretable at registered thresholds — the run would have burned even had bar3 passed (H_001 admissibility recurrence). FIX (Fable option i, $0): dacc_panel scores only field-carried FREE slots {0,1,2,4} computed from the codebook; C-perm re-scores 0.643→0.465 (chance). bar3 corrected two-sided + held-out f2″ + parity confirmation. Free-slot fit-check running; full run held. Convergence build-honbind-multi-py-1.

H_004 bar3 probe: leak reaches held-out (d=64 confound) bar3_probe.py (d=64 discriminator) FLIPPED the benign prior: C-perm held-out f2″=0.6615 (out of harness band [0.45,0.55]), A-duel held-out f2″=1.0. The bar3 fail is NOT benign drill-memorization — the ×65 answer up-weight makes the answer recoverable via a non-field (surface) channel that reaches the held-out panel. CONFOUND: probe is d=64 while run-1's clean C-perm (0.45/0.5) was d=384 under the diluted objective, so boosted-objective-leaks is not yet separated from d=64-over-exploits-surface. Missing decisive cell = C-perm f2″ at d=384 boosted. Fable-5 adjudicating; full 5-arm run held until the harness is clean.

H_004 fit-check: dilution fix CONFIRMED (bar1/2), bar3 harness NO-GO Fit-check (MPS d=64/L2, CPT 200 + drill 1500) confirmed the objective-dilution fix: A-duel drill d_acc 0.83/0.64 (run-1) → 1.0/1.0 seed-stable, ce_ans→0.0004 (bar1+bar2 PASS). This validates the root cause was masked-CE dilution + under-optimization, not capacity (recorded as convergence train-h004-py-3). bar3 (C-perm on drill true-gold ≤0.60) FAILED at 0.6432 → NO-GO, full run not launched. bar3 gates the harness arm on the drill (training-dist, memorizable) whereas the frozen harness gate measures C-perm on held-out f2″ (run-1=0.45/0.5, clean) — adjudication (genuine surface-leak reaching f2″ vs benign d=64 memorization) delegated to Fable-5.

H_004 objective amendment applied (drill CE dilution fix) Absorbed Fable-5 root-cause (btgczi488): run-1 precond failed because drill CE converged to 6·ln2/233=0.0178 — masked CE over ~233 surface bytes drowned the 18 answer bytes so the objective could not distinguish binding-solved from chance. Applied 6 arm-blind fixes to train_h004.py (F1 thresholds/arms/panels frozen): two-term drill CE (ce_surf + 5.0·ce_ans, ×65 answer up-weight via new amask over predict-positions base-1..base+3K-2), drill LR warmup+cosine 3e-4→1e-5, grad-clip 1.0, per-step logging, drill_steps 2500→4000, and a --fit-check d=64 MPS pre-flight with a 3-part go-bar. CPU smoke GREEN (WIRING-4 A-duel overfits 16 items to d_acc=1.0, injection path intact after the objective change). Honest downside: if a properly-fitted A-duel still shows f2″ gap <0.05 vs A-rank1, that is mech-1 falsified, not an artifact.

H_004 G-2 run complete → WIRING FAILURE (precond) The parser-duel falsification run finished (d=384, 5 arms × 2 seeds, ~3.5h MPS) but collect_verdict_h004.py returned WIRING FAILURE, not a mechanism verdict: the frozen admissibility precond drill d_acc(A-duel) ≥ 0.95 failed (s0=0.8255, s1=0.6354). Quarantined per infra-wall-noneval + verdict-integrity — the model never fit its own K=6 drill, so no falsifier is admissible; this is a training/capacity wall, not mech-1's answer. Drill fit is above chance but seed-unstable (0.83↔0.64), pointing at under-training over a capacity ceiling; prime suspect is the drill masking CE over all ~250 surface bytes rather than the 6 answer slots. Raw seed panel recorded (F1 Δ seed0 +0.20 / seed1 −0.02, controls clean) but gated by the failed precond. Root-cause + minimal-fix design delegated to Fable-5; F1 thresholds/arms/panels stay frozen.

H_004 풀런 첫 발사 CRASH(MPS device-placement)→격리(infra-wall-noneval, 측정0·verdict무오염)→근본수정: node_embed가 입력을 param device로 이동 + full-check를 target device(MPS)로. MPS full-check GREEN(5 arm drill MPS 통과). convergence train-h004-py-2(CPU smoke는 device버그 못 봄→target device서 1 forward 필수). 재발사.

H_004 verdict collector collect_verdict_h004.py built + wiring-verified ($0): reads train_result_full.json → F1(Δ≥0.15 both)·F2(f1'≥0.85)·precond(drill≥0.95)·F3(C-scaf<0.60)·F4(offtop≥0.20)·F5(union)·F6(placebo)·harness(C-perm) → SUPPORTED/PARTIAL/FALSIFIED. Synthetic clean → SUPPORTED; no-result → guard.

H_004 FROZEN + G-2 run launched: all $0 gates PASS, full-loop plumbing GREEN at d=64 (--full-check, C-perm gold-shuffle bug caught+fixed). G-1 finalized LLM-judged PASS under owner go-delegation (caveats accepted-risk, reversible). pre_register_frozen:true; train_h004.py d=384 ×2seed ×5arm (~5h) LAUNCHED → F1-F6+harness → train_result_full.json. Do NOT prejudge (verdict-integrity).

H_004 G-2 driver train_h004.py BUILT + smoke wiring GREEN ($0): WIRING-1..5 pass, A-duel overfits 16 drill items to d_acc 1.0 (injection path confirmed). Smoke caught+fixed 2 wiring bugs pre-GPU (pad-truncation; struct off-by-one at answer-prediction position). Design deviation recorded: answer bytes → conjunct-k node at prediction position (not ANS node) — testable + faithful to format claim. RUN gated on native G-1 + freeze.

H_004 G-2 drill grid built (gen_drill_h004.py → drill_grid_multi.json, n=384): K=6 MULTI-BIND on drilled 9HON/8PLAIN pools, GF(4)-MDS decorrelated (per-slot 0.5, pairwise dev 0.0), F7″ lexeme-disjointness PENDING→PASS (held-out lexemes + 기다렸네요 absent from every drill surface). All $0 pre-freeze gates now closed except native-operator G-1.

H_004 MULTI-BIND G-1 grammar: provisional LLM PASS (g1_multi_grammar_provisional.md) — K=6 stacked surfaces grammatical (each conjunct well-formed, 6-fold 도-stack ok, ±시 concord, 4 new lexemes class-correct). Freeze gated ONLY on native-operator confirm (PL normativity · loose associative P의H genitives · 6-stack length), then pre_register_frozen → G-2 d384.

Research-gate seed for the next mechanism after mech-1 (state/h007_gradient_tug_role_code_drill_2026-07-17/DESIGN_fable5_seed.md): SELECT mech-5 경사 줄다리기 (ROLE-TUG drill, register as H_007 — H_006 stays burned). Residual-rewrite family (mech-2/4) REJECTED AT $0: hand-staging collapses into H_004's sealed FORMAT claim (DEAD unreachable), learned-staging is bounded by G3-a's measured value channel (E[Δ] ≤ ~0.22·ρ, no 2×-headroom bar certifiable) — walled, unreached-not-falsified, reopen shared with mech-1's support half. mech-5 design: one trunk two objectives (head-G = role-swap-aligned byte-CE, one variable = its target), F1 Δ(A-tug − C-dup) ≥ 0.15 on SWAP-XOR panel (heuristics 0.5), reachability 0.38 ≥ 2×bar, 'is-it-thinking' converted to instruments (P-conflict precondition + C-shuf placebo), inherited v1-killers F4 eff-rank/F5 projection-ablation, $0 gates G-0 (closed-form) + G-1 (d=64 kill-only smoke). Tree: ng.mech5-is-next + ng.family-2-4-walled + fd.family-residual-rewrite cross-ref.
